title: Mini-Mu: A Language for Understanding Duality
summary: An exploratory extended abstract on using a compact core language to teach and study computational duality.

title: Pie in Source Academy
summary: A project report describing a browser-based implementation of Pie designed for classroom use in Source Academy.

title: Correctness and Incorrectness Reasoning for Reliable Software
summary: A working paper on combining correctness and incorrectness reasoning in reliable and AI-assisted software development.
